printed.name: Side Over on Box
printed.setup: Sitting sideways on Short Box, one leg straight, foot dorsiflexed and under foot strap, other leg bent on top of box, hands behind head, body on straight diagonal line
printed.resistance: all springs attached to hold carriage in place

movement.exhale: Straighten and lift trunk, return to start position

cues: Maintain hip of straight leg in parallel position
Maintain co-contraction of abdominals and back extensors
Imagine moving between two panes of glass
